title: helichrysum pallidum
intro: Helichrysum pallidum, also known as the pale yellow daisy or strawflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Eastern Cape Province in South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum pallidum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, as well as alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, teas, and capsules, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
